query: Current fill percentage/storage of Lázaro Cárdenas (El Palmito) dam in Durango Mexico from Conagua SINA, latest daily readings for July 2026 and late June 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here is a summary of the key findings on the Lázaro Cárdenas (El Palmito) dam for the requested period:

**Current trajectory (June–July 2026): DECLINING**
- **June 1, 2026:** 915.948 Mm³ (~31.0% fill) — POSTA México
- **June 19, 2026:** 765 Mm³ (25.87% fill), falling ~7 Mm³/day — El Sol de la Laguna / El Coahuilense
- **July 8, 2026:** 21% fill, inflows 44 m³/s vs. outflows 109 m³/s — Milenio

The decline is driven by extractions for the 2026 agricultural cycle (~750 Mm³ committed) with weak river inflows. Gates were expected to close in the **last week of July 2026**, with a projected cycle-end volume of ~565 Mm³.

**Critical caveat I flagged:** Many prominent search results showing *recovery* (718.2 Mm³, 24.2%, "+231 Mm³", 487 Mm³ on July 1) are from **July 2025, not 2026** — they reflect the opposite (rising) trend after historic lows and must not be conflated with the 2026 data.

**Data limitation:** The CONAGUA SINA live monitor is a JavaScript app behind bot-challenge protection and couldn't be scraped directly; daily values came via regional press citing the CONAGUA daily hydrometric report. No confirmed daily reading after July 8, 2026 was found in accessible sources as of the July 14 access date.

sources.title: Presas en Durango inician junio de 2026 con este nivel de almacenamiento
Presa El Palmito acumula apenas 765 millones de m3
sources.snippet: June 19, 2026: 765 Mm³ = 25.87%, falling ~7 Mm³/day; gates to close last week of July; projected ~565 Mm³ at cycle-end.

sources.snippet: Viernes 19 de junio de 2026: 765 Mm³, 25.87%; will close gates by end of July.

sources.title: Presa El Palmito al 21 por ciento; escasas aportaciones agravan crisis
sources.snippet: Published 2026-07-08. El Palmito at 21%; inflow 44 m³/s, outflow 109 m³/s to Las Tórtolas; 750 Mm³ extracted for 2026 cycle.

sources.title: Monitoreo de Presas - CONAGUA SINA

sources.title: Región Laguna: Presa Lázaro Cárdenas sigue recibiendo escurrimientos
sources.snippet: Cites dam capacity 2,770.5 Mm³; (July 2025 context data — recovery, not 2026).

sources.title: Presa Lázaro Cárdenas sube 231 millones de metros cúbicos en 3 semanas
sources.snippet: Dated 2025-07-26 (NOT 2026): 718.2 Mm³, 24.2%; 487 Mm³ on July 1, 2025. Do not use for 2026.
